diff:
--- a/search/indexer.py
+++ b/search/indexer.py
@@ -15,6 +15,10 @@
 def index_document(doc_id, content):
-    es.index(index='docs', id=doc_id, body={'content': content})
+    es.index(
+        index='docs',
+        id=doc_id,
+        body={'content': content, 'indexed_at': datetime.utcnow().isoformat()},
+        refresh='wait_for'
+    )
+    invalidate_search_cache(doc_id)
